subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turning unto the Kingdom of God! Thy letter is received and perused. It afforded us joy and pleasure, gave us good news and is the token of the wealth of thy love. This period of time is the Promised Age,
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بملکوت الهی آنچه نوشتید ملاحظه گردید وجد و سرور بود و بشارت و حبور و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual springtime, @love and unity, @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @predictions and prophecies
